title: A1 Starter English
description: Build basic survival English for names, places, family, classroom language, daily objects and simple routines.
cefr_outcome: Learners can understand and use familiar everyday expressions and very basic phrases for immediate needs.
course_objectives: Build A1 receptive and productive skills.
Complete structured lessons, interactive practice and assessments.
Use English confidently in real-world tasks appropriate to the level.
Prepare for the next CEFR band through evidence-based progress tracking.

modules.title: Personal Information and Classroom English
outcomes: Complete six lessons connected to personal information and classroom english.
Demonstrate A1 language control in integrated skills tasks.
Complete a module assessment and reflection.
